def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  return [] if n == 0
  return nums.dup if n == 1

  # 1. Calculate L array: L[i] is the maximum element strictly to the left of index i.
  # Initialize L with 0s. L[0] remains 0, representing no elements to the left.
  l = Array.new(n, 0)
  current_max = nums[0]
  for i in range(1, n)
    l[i] = [l[i-1], nums[i-1]].max
  end

  # 2. Calculate R array: R[i] is the maximum element strictly to the right of index i.
  # Initialize R with 0s. R[n-1] remains 0, representing no elements to the right.
  r = Array.new(n, 0)
  for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1)
    r[i] = [r[i+1], nums[i+1]].max
  end

  result = []

  # 3. Check validity
  for i in range(n)
    is_valid = false
    
    # First and last elements are always valid
    if i == 0 || i == n - 1
      is_valid = true
    else
      # Check condition A: strictly greater than all elements to its left (L[i])
      condition_a = nums[i] > l[i]
      
      # Check condition B: strictly greater than all elements to its right (R[i])
      condition_b = nums[i] > r[i]
      
      # Valid if A OR B is true
      is_valid = condition_a || condition_b
    end

    result << nums[i] if is_valid
  end

  return result
end

    # R[i] stores max(nums[i+1]...nums[n-1])
    r = Array.new(n, 0)

    for i in (0...(n - 1)).to_a.reverse
